return(function(z,k,D,F,H,Y,n,X,B,f,C,a,l,c,M,x,g,N,h,U,Q,J,T,d,w)T,x,X,a,B,N,w,U,M,h,g,d,J,C,f,l,c,Q=function(z)local m,C=964503-964502,z[-87555-(-87556)]while C do d[z],J[z]=nil,nil end end,function(z,m)local k=X(m)local D=function(D,F,H,Y,n,J)return C(z,{D,F;H,Y;n,J},m,k)end return D end,function(z,m)local k=X(m)local D=function(D,F,H)return C(z,{D;F;H},m,k)end
